feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PO No Not Visible in ME53N
entry.content:
PO was Created With Respect to PR.

But Po no was not visible in Purchase Order Column.

Also Po no was was not visible in Eban:-EBELN & EBELP Field.

Where as the same was visible in PR status Tab.

PR no:-1100174948,LI:-50

entry.title: GR Based IV not allowed in return STO
entry.content: System pops up error message 'Message No. MEPO025 Indicator for GR-based invoice verification used not allowed' when creating inter-company return STO, and Incoterms defaulted from PIR is removed at return STO item level.

entry.title: Goods issue date calculation after PO creation
entry.content:
For the POs user have to anticipate the goods issue date by one day. If user advance the delivery date one day, the issue date is brought forward by 2. Below are the PO's being affected

4577918278 

4577918274
4577918276
4577918278
4577918280
4577918282 

Please help us to understand how the goods issue date being calculated after the PO creation as per the delivery date.

User is expecting it should update delivery date = good issue date + 2 in this manner. Please suggest what settings we can do to achieve these combination

entry.title: Partnerbanktyp aus F-47 nicht im F110 Echtlauf
entry.content: Ich habe eine Buchung in der Transaktion F-47 erfasst, bei der der Partnerbanktyp gepflegt wurde, aber dieser wird nicht an die Transaktion F110 im Echtlauf übergeben. Ich möchte wissen, warum der Partnerbanktyp nicht automatisch in den Zahlungsbeleg übernommen wird und welche Einstellungen oder Anpassungen erforderlich sind, um dieses Problem zu beheben. Im F110 Vorschlagslauf im Protokoll ist der Partnerbanktyp richtig aufgeführt.

entry.title: CO Substitution during KO88 PM Order to set a Secondary (statistic) posting.
entry.content:
Hello Gurus
My customer ask to post a secondary posting to a Statistic Internal Order, when I settle the PM Order costs to a Cost-Center.
I manage the internal Order n° on PM-Order (ILOA-AUFNR), and I thought to use a CO subsitution made by user-exit on program ZRGGBS000 to set this secondary accounting. If i set manually the Order n° during the debug teh system works fine, a secondary statistic posting item is created. Unfortunally in structure COBL and  other input structures doesn't contain the PM Order in process, so is not possible to read the Statistic Order assigned in ILOA-AUFNR field. 
How to solve this issue to get the PM order n° in process ? is ti possible get this info by modify table GGB1, or read this info from the memory ? Thanks for your reply.
Claudio

entry.title: Asset planed deprecation Issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The business posted asset adjustment entries on 31-Dec-2025 for the following three assets:

  • 247000009
  • 247000008
  • 247000000

However, planned depreciation is being generated only for Asset 247000009. For the other two assets (247000008 and 247000000), planned depreciation is not being displayed

entry.title: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 - EXTENSIONIN data not updated/processed correctly for custom fields
entry.content:
We are facing an issue while creating a purchase order using BAPI_PO_CREATE1.

  • The custom fields are being passed through the EXTENSIONIN parameter. However, the values are not getting updated in the corresponding purchase order fields after successful BAPI execution.

entry.title: Changing the exchange rate while posting GR with respect to PO
entry.content:
• We have created the purchase order where exchange rate A is derived as per the SAP Standard Process.Further Good Receipt is also created and we have observed Accounting Document which is posted with same exchange rate i.e. A.
  • But our requirement is to change the exchange rate during creation of Good Receipt and accounting document to be posted with new exchange rate i.e B accordingly amount value needs to update.

  • We are checking if any BADI or enhancement spots are available to write custom logic specifically to change the exchange rate at Good receipt creation.

     

    Observation during the SAP standard program debug : Although we are changing the value of exchange rate from Old to new, it is not calculating the amount value with respect to new exchange rate.

     

    Seeking you suggestions or any SAP Note for our references.

entry.title: Planed Deprecation Issue
entry.content: Asset planed Deprecation

entry.title: Newly created Workbench Transport Requests are not visible in /UI2/FLPD_CONF transport selection
entry.content:
When modifying a Fiori Catalog in /UI2/FLPD_CONF, the transport selection popup displays only older Workbench Transport Requests. Newly created transport requests are not visible, although they exist in SE09, are modifiable, and contain an open task for the same user. Manual entry of the transport request is also not possible.
iI have attached the document.

entry.title: while creating physical inventory facing the message: No storage bin selected for clearing
entry.content: while creating physical inventory facing the transaction LI20

entry.title: Standard Workflow WS80100005 – Work Item Not Revoked When PO Released via ME28/ME29
entry.content:
Subject: Standard Workflow WS80100005 – Work Item Not Revoked When PO Released via ME28/ME29N

Description:

Dear SAP Support Team,

We are using the standard Purchase Order Release Workflow WS80100005.

Issue Description: When a PO is submitted for approval, the workflow creates a work item and sends it to the approver's inbox. However, some users are releasing the PO directly using transactions ME28 or ME29N instead of processing the workflow work item.

In such cases:

  • The PO release code is updated successfully.
  • The corresponding workflow work item remains active in the user's inbox.
  • The workflow item is not automatically completed, cancelled, or revoked.
  • Subsequent workflow processing and reminder emails may not behave as expected.

Expected Behavior: Once the PO has been released through ME28/ME29N, the related workflow work item should be automa

entry.title: 67332 67343 - WT against 2 OBD
entry.content: 67332 67343 this are the Two warehouse Task, assign for same location same material, but 64332 warehouse task is create for 80006743 order and 67343 is create for 80006742 Order. as Picker start Picking on outbound order basis due to Even same location has Enough QTy still did partial picking.

entry.title: Asset not fully depreciating with Dep to day approach in SAp
entry.content: We created Dep Keys by selecting the 'Deo to day' checkbox for both straightline and Multi level percent Dep Key. But the Assets the Assets are not fully depreciated after the useful life. Please check. Allow us to create an SAP incident as we already asked in SAP Community but no response. Thanks

entry.title: EKBE-BUKRS not fetching value for delivery item.
entry.content:
We are upgrading our system from SAP S4 HANA 2021 version  to 2025 version. Now, table EKBE, has a field BUKRS(company code). But for some POs, which has delivery created, the BUKRS is not filled.

PO : 4522523339

entry.title: Unable to select data from the entries list
entry.content:
Regarding the issue where data cannot be selected from the entries List, I previously checked the related SAP Note and found that this issue is planned to be fixed in version 2606 or 2608.

In that case, what actions are required on our system side to resolve this issue? Do we need to take any additional steps, or will the issue be fixed automatically after the upgrade?

I would appreciate your guidance.

SAP Note reference: 3763555 - WEBGUI: History not working after Chrome / Edge 149 update - SAP for Me

entry.title: HANA Storage Issue
entry.content:
I have cleaned up the *** pointer data via transaction BD22 by removing all records from *** . The table volume has decreased from *** million entries to *** million entries.

When checking large tables and disk consumption via transaction DB02, the table size did not shrink immediately (I noticed the table size was reduced the next day).
However, the database disk usage overview still shows *** GB occupied with no reduction.
Is it safe to purge all data from table *** entirely?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: We are facing an issue while exporting data from the CJI3 report
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are facing an issue while exporting data from the CJI3 report.

Issue Description:

  • Transaction Code: CJI3
  • Selection Criteria:
    • Posting Date: 01.06.2026 to 30.06.2026
    • Projects: All Projects
  • The report executes successfully and the output screen is displayed.
  • However, when attempting to export/download the report output (Excel/Spreadsheet), the system throws an error and the data is not downloaded.

Expected Result: The report data should be exported successfully to Excel.

Actual Result: The system displays an error during export and the file is not downloaded.

entry.title: Customer Number Not Displayed for Certain Documents in FBL5N – Customer Line-Item Display
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are experiencing an issue in Transaction FBL5N (Customer Line Item Display) where the Customer Number field is not populated for a few accounting documents, although the documents are displayed under the respective customer account.

Observed Behavior

  • In FBL5N output, some line items show a blank Customer Number field.
  • Other line items for the same customer display the Customer Number correctly.
  • As shown in the attached file, customer numbers such as 902500 and 901400 are displayed for some records, while several other records belonging to the same customer appear with a blank Customer Number field.

entry.title: FBL1N mass block
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to apply Payment block through FBL1N mass feature, but due to baseline date is not editable system is not allowing it.

 

Please find attached Document for detailed steps.
